_README: 20 historical ED triage cases — synthetic but clinically realistic. Generated via Claude Sonnet on Vertex Model Garden.
_model: claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929 + 3 PDF-extracted cases from Kaggle synthetic_medical_triage (2026-05-06)

cases.nurse_note: Diaphoretic, clutching chest, cool extremities. Patient states crushing substernal pain radiating to left arm for 45 minutes.
cases.history: HTN, hyperlipidemia, former smoker. Pain started at rest.
cases.summary: 62M with crushing chest pain, hypotensive, diaphoretic, concerning for STEMI

cases.nurse_note: Unrestrained driver, prolonged extrication, GCS 13, pelvis unstable on exam. EMS reports significant dashboard intrusion.
cases.history: High-speed MVC, airbag deployed, steering wheel deformity.
cases.summary: 28F unrestrained MVC with shock and unstable pelvis requiring trauma activation

cases.nurse_note: Severe respiratory distress, tripoding, unable to speak full sentences. Diffuse wheezing and rales audible.
cases.history: CHF, asthma. Ran out of diuretics 5 days ago, worsening dyspnea.
cases.summary: 45M severe dyspnea with hypoxia and respiratory distress, CHF exacerbation

cases.nurse_note: Stridor noted, drooling, sitting upright and forward. Mother states sudden onset, child appears toxic.
cases.history: No known asthma, recent URI symptoms, now sudden worsening with stridor.
cases.summary: 8M with stridor, drooling, tripoding concerning for epiglottitis or foreign body

cases.nurse_note: Alert but left facial droop noted, left arm drift. Patient states symptoms started 30 minutes ago while watching TV.
cases.history: Atrial fibrillation not on anticoagulation, HTN. Sudden left-sided weakness.
cases.summary: 72F with acute stroke symptoms within window, vitals stable but neuro deficit present

cases.nurse_note: Severe RLQ pain, guarding, positive rebound. Patient curled in fetal position, last menstrual period 6 weeks ago.
cases.history: Sudden onset severe RLQ pain 2 hours ago, vaginal spotting today.
cases.summary: 34F severe RLQ pain with tachycardia and peritoneal signs, concern for ectopic pregnancy

cases.nurse_note: Cooperative, flat affect, admits to plan with access to means. States took 40 ibuprofen tablets 1 hour ago.
cases.history: Depression, recent breakup. Active SI with plan and recent overdose attempt.
cases.summary: 19M suicide attempt with overdose and ongoing SI requiring psychiatric admission

cases.nurse_note: Anxious appearing, substernal pressure for 3 hours, intermittent. Patient has cardiac history with prior stent.
cases.history: CAD with stent 2 years ago, DM, current smoker. Atypical but concerning features.
cases.summary: 56M chest pain with cardiac risk factors requiring observation and rule-out MI

cases.nurse_note: Confused to time and place, different from baseline per family. Skin warm, slight tachypnea noted. Family reports decreased PO intake for 2 days.
cases.history: Dementia, UTIs recurrent. Fall at home, no head strike, but altered mental status.
cases.summary: 82F fall with subtle confusion and low-grade fever, concern for occult sepsis in elderly

cases.nurse_note: Severe occipital headache, photophobia, mild neck stiffness. Patient states worst headache of life, sudden onset 2 hours ago.
cases.history: No migraine history, sudden thunderclap headache while exercising.
cases.summary: 38F thunderclap headache with meningeal signs requiring SAH workup

cases.nurse_note: Lethargic, petechial rash on trunk and extremities. Parent states fever since this morning, now barely responding.
cases.history: Previously healthy, fever x 8 hours, non-blanching rash developed in last hour.
cases.summary: 5F high fever with petechial rash and lethargy concerning for meningococcemia

cases.nurse_note: RLQ tenderness with guarding, positive McBurney's point. Patient ambulates slowly, appears uncomfortable.
cases.history: Periumbilical pain migrating to RLQ over 12 hours, anorexia, one episode vomiting.
cases.summary: 29M RLQ pain with classic appendicitis presentation requiring surgical evaluation

cases.nurse_note: Severe lower back pain radiating to abdomen, pulsatile mass palpated. Patient writhing in pain, appears distressed.
cases.history: HTN poorly controlled, smoker. Sudden onset tearing back pain 1 hour ago.
cases.summary: 67M severe back pain with pulsatile mass concerning for AAA requiring vascular surgery

cases.nurse_note: 20 weeks pregnant, moderate bleeding with cramping. Fetal movement decreased per patient, appears anxious.
cases.history: G3P2, 20 weeks gestation, bleeding started 3 hours ago with clots.
cases.summary: 42F at 20 weeks with vaginal bleeding and decreased fetal movement requiring OB evaluation

cases.nurse_note: Left ankle swollen and ecchymotic, deformity noted. Patient ambulated in on crutches from car, weight-bearing.
cases.history: Twisted ankle playing basketball 2 hours ago, heard pop, able to walk after initial pain.
cases.summary: 23M ankle injury with swelling requiring X-ray and orthopedic evaluation

cases.nurse_note: 2 cm laceration to right forearm from broken glass, bleeding controlled with pressure. Wound clean, neurovascular intact.
cases.history: Cut arm on broken drinking glass 30 minutes ago, no other injuries.
cases.summary: 31F simple forearm laceration requiring repair and tetanus update

cases.nurse_note: Productive cough with yellow sputum for 5 days, worsening. Lung sounds with scattered rhonchi bilaterally.
cases.history: Smoker, COPD. Cough and increased sputum production, fever started yesterday.
cases.summary: 52M COPD exacerbation with productive cough and low-grade fever

cases.nurse_note: Alert, severe pounding headache, reports palpitations and sweating episodes. Patient appears flushed, hands tremulous.
cases.history: Episodic severe headaches with sweating and palpitations for 3 months, worse today.
cases.summary: 26F paroxysmal hypertension with headache concerning for pheochromocytoma, young with rare condition

cases.nurse_note: Mild erythema to posterior pharynx, no exudate. Patient ambulatory, taking PO fluids without difficulty.
cases.history: Sore throat for 3 days, no fever at home, wanted evaluation.
cases.summary: 24M simple pharyngitis with mild symptoms and stable vitals

cases.nurse_note: Well-appearing, states ran out of lisinopril and PCP not available until next week. No acute complaints.
cases.history: HTN controlled on medication, requesting refill, no symptoms.
cases.summary: 35F non-urgent medication refill request with no acute medical issues

cases.nurse_note: Walked in unassisted. Altered mental status, unresponsive. Pain 2/10. HR 98, BP 102/66, SpO2 95.8%, Temp 36.2°C.
cases.history: Patient is a 53-year-old with one chronic condition (hypertension). Chief complaint: patient collapsed at home. Reported pain level 2/10. 2 prior ER visits.
cases.summary: ESI-1 case: altered mental status, unresponsive, age 53, HR 98, SBP 102, SpO2 95.8%, pain 2/10.

cases.nurse_note: Walked in unassisted. Chest pain, shortness of breath. Pain 3/10. HR 76, BP 146/95, SpO2 96.0%, Temp 37.6°C.
cases.history: Patient is a 49-year-old with two chronic conditions (DM, HTN). Chief complaint: crushing chest pressure radiating to left arm. Reported pain level 3/10. 1 prior ER visits.
cases.summary: ESI-2 case: chest pain, shortness of breath, age 49, HR 76, SBP 146, SpO2 96.0%, pain 3/10.

cases.nurse_note: Arrived by wheelchair. Abdominal pain, fever. Pain 7/10. HR 98, BP 153/100, SpO2 94.0%, Temp 38.7°C.
cases.history: Patient is a 75-year-old with one chronic condition (hypertension). Chief complaint: diffuse abdominal pain with fever and vomiting. Reported pain level 7/10. 1 prior ER visits.
cases.summary: ESI-3 case: abdominal pain, fever, age 75, HR 98, SBP 153, SpO2 94.0%, pain 7/10.
